+ "\"AppleH16CamIn::%s: ispAddress is out of bounds\\n\" @%s:%d"
+ ""
+ "AppleH16CamIn:%s - Coredump DATA IOPFwVirtualAddress: 0x%llx, APFwVirtualAddress: 0x%llx, FirmwareLength: 0x%llx\n"
+ "AppleH16CamIn:%s - Coredump TEXT IOPFwVirtualAddress: 0x%llx, APFwVirtualAddress: 0x%llx, FirmwareLength: 0x%llx\n"
+ "AppleH16CamIn:%s - Creating segment IOMemoryDescriptors failed!!\n"
+ "AppleH16CamIn:%s - couldn't prepare memory descriptors: text=0x%x, data=0x%x\n"
+ "AppleH16CamIn:%s - request length: 0x%x, new FW size: 0x%x, TEXT size: 0x%x, DATA size: 0x%x\n"
+ "AppleH16CamIn::H16ISPSharedMemorySurfaces:%s - in CTRR DATA region: physicalAddress: %llu, DATA base: %llu, size: %#llxn\n"
